threats.title: The Hidden Cost of Recurring Credential Incidents
threats.summary: When talking about credential security, the focus usually lands on breach prevention. This makes sense when IBM’s 2025 Cost of a Data Breach Report puts the average cost of a breach at $4.4 million. threats.title: New GPUBreach Attack Enables Full CPU Privilege Escalation via GDDR6 Bit-Flips
threats.summary: New academic research has identified multiple RowHammer attacks against high-performance graphics processing units (GPUs) that could be exploited to escalate privileges and, in some cases, even take full control of a host.
